lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I've run out of money.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: I'm sorry, sir, but I don't believe you can hold the ticket.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: I'm an employee of Keldagrim Carts. I make sure the carts in this area run on time and that people pay their fares.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can you take me?

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: I don't think I'm allowed to take you into the city of Keldagrim, human. Perhaps when you find another way into the city and talk to someone of importance there you will be allowed to.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: This track leads right up to Keldagrim. Only stop.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy a ticket.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: One ticket to Keldagrim, that's 150 coins then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I've run out of money.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: I'm sorry, sir, but I don't believe you can hold the ticket.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Thanks for your custom!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I changed my mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I've run out of money.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: I'm sorry, sir, but I don't believe you can hold the ticket.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: This is only 75 coins, I can't let you have a ticket for that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, don't worry. I'll pay you another 75 coins for the next ticket I buy, alright?

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Well... I suppose so.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have to go.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Just remember, wherever you go, you go there faster through Keldagrim Carts.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: I can't sell any more tickets right now, I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can you take me?

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: I can't take you anywhere at the moment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy a ticket.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: I can't sell any more tickets right now, I'm afraid.
